回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 進階商務報告 (Advanced Business Presentation)	開課班級 : 應英四甲	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 羅主恩	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Objectives: Develop skills and qualities of Business public speaking by: --Discovering the importance of speech communication in everyday life --Recognizing the importance of the audience in business speech preparation --Presenting the steps in planning an effective Business speech and Business Proposals and Negotiations --Examining the importance of the parts of a speech: introduction, transition and conclusion --Exploring different techniques in delivery and their effectiveness --Comparing the use of various types of visual aids and their purpose in a speech 


2.教學綱要
Activities: Reading/studying of the textbook assignment is required for effective class
participation. Class activities will include public speaking, listening, evaluating and constructive critiquing discussions. Midterm and final examinations consist of questions in test format.
 


3.教科書
2	書名 : Various sources　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : various authors　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations: 25% mid-term, 30% final test and 45% assigned speeches/presentations and participation in class (attendance, tardiness, class activities and discussions, and active listening and participation, constructive evaluation of class presentations. 
Attendance: 2 class absences are permitted without penalty but all assignments are required. Make sure you contact another student for notes, assignments, or hand-outs prior to the next class. Being 10-minutes late for class is regarded as an absence. 
Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the due dates will NOT be accepted.
